case_studies.title: Fast-Track Scalp Detox Shampoo Line for Indie Brand
case_studies.summary: An indie clean-beauty brand launched a sulfate-free scalp detox shampoo line in just three months using our stock base platform.
case_studies.content:
A growing indie brand approached us with a brief for a sulfate-free, fragrance-free scalp detox shampoo suitable for sensitive scalps. They needed a rapid launch window to align with a major influencer campaign. By starting from our pre-validated sulfate-free shampoo base and layering in a clinically tested exfoliating complex, we eliminated most of the R&D and stability work.

We aligned regulatory, packaging, and artwork timelines in parallel. Pilot batches were approved after a single round of adjustments, and the first commercial run was scheduled six weeks before the launch date, providing a buffer for fulfillment.
case_studies.results:
• Time-to-launch: 3 months from project kickoff to first shipment
• 97% batch acceptance rate in the first production run
• 40% lower development cost versus a fully custom formulation
• Gained nationwide placement with two specialty retail chains

case_studies.title: Clean Shampoo Collection with Global Retailer Listing
case_studies.summary: A mid-size brand expanded into a clean shampoo collection and met a strict retailer launch window in four months.
case_studies.content:
A mid-size personal care brand needed a trio of clean shampoos (moisture, volume, and color care) that met EU, UK, and US retail clean-beauty standards. Using our sulfate-free base as a starting point, we created three fragrance variants aligned with the brand’s existing body care line.

Artwork, carton specifications, and multilingual INCI panels were developed in parallel with pilot batching. Early buy-in from the retailer allowed us to lock planograms ahead of production, minimizing launch risk.
case_studies.results:
• Time-to-launch: 4 months
• Approved in the first retailer quality audit
• 25% above forecast sell-through in the first 8 weeks
• Platform now used for seasonal fragrance extensions

case_studies.title: Salon Partner Clarifying Shampoo Refresh
case_studies.summary: A professional salon brand refreshed its hero clarifying shampoo with a gentler, sulfate-free base in just eight weeks.
case_studies.content:
A salon-focused brand wanted to modernize its best-selling clarifying shampoo, reducing irritation while keeping the same performance profile. We proposed a sulfate-free base with chelating and clarifying actives for hard water build-up, validated with instrumental testing.

Because the brand kept existing packaging, the project focused on formula matching, salon stylist testing, and regulatory updates. Parallel pilot runs allowed stylists to provide feedback while stability testing was ongoing.
case_studies.results:
• Time-to-launch: 2 months
• 20% reduction in reported scalp irritation
• Maintained 95% of original clarifying performance in lab tests
• Positive adoption from over 2,000 partner salons

case_studies.title: Premium Color Care Range with Bond-Repair Technology
case_studies.summary: A prestige brand built a full color care regimen with bond-repair shampoo, conditioner, and mask over a nine-month R&D program.
case_studies.content:
A prestige hair care brand commissioned a fully custom color care system with bond-repair technology. The project included shampoo, conditioner, and a deep treatment mask across three fragrance directions.

We developed a new base system, performed accelerated and real-time stability, conducted bond-strength testing, and navigated complex claims substantiation across the EU and North America.
case_studies.results:
• Time-to-launch: 9 months
• 3-product regimen with aligned fragrance profiles
• Clinically supported bond-repair claims
• Launch sell-out in several key prestige retailers

case_studies.title: Anti-Aging Serum Line for Direct-to-Consumer Brand
case_studies.summary: A DTC brand launched a trio of anti-aging serums with graded price tiers using shared base technology.
case_studies.content: We helped a digitally native brand rapidly build a good-better-best anti-aging serum ladder, using one shared base system and different active complexes at each price tier.
case_studies.results:
• Time-to-launch: 5 months
• 3 coordinated SKUs with unified sensorial profile
• 30% overall margin improvement versus prior contract manufacturer

case_studies.title: Plastic-Free Bar Soap Program for Retail Chain
case_studies.summary: A regional retailer transitioned its private label bar soaps into plastic-free, recycled carton formats.
case_studies.content: We redesigned a five-SKU bar soap range to remove plastic film and move into FSC-certified recycled cartons, while maintaining price points and improving perceived quality.
case_studies.results:
• 100% plastic film removed from the program
• 60% post-consumer recycled fiber in cartons
• Positive consumer response and improved shelf impact

case_studies.title: Men’s Grooming Rebrand with Turnkey Bundle
case_studies.summary: A legacy men’s grooming label modernized its range using a five-SKU turnkey bundle.
case_studies.content: By leveraging our men’s grooming turnkey bundle, the brand replatformed into sulfate-free hair and beard care with cohesive packaging and upgraded fragrances.
case_studies.results:
• 5 SKUs launched under a new visual identity
• 35% increase in average basket size post-launch

case_studies.title: Hospitality Amenity Refresh for Boutique Hotel Group
case_studies.summary: A boutique hotel group transitioned to amenity-size, eco-conscious formulas in four months.
case_studies.content: We partnered with a boutique hotel chain to create amenity-size shampoo and body wash options in the 35–40 ml range, aligned with their sustainability goals.
case_studies.results:
• 4-month rollout across 18 properties
• 25% reduction in plastic per occupied room
• Improved guest satisfaction scores for bath amenities

case_studies.title: From Concept to Launch for a New D2C Personal Care Brand
case_studies.summary: A first-time founder launched a cohesive personal care line across multiple categories in ten months.
case_studies.content: This project spanned hair care, face care, and body care, using a mix of turnkey collections and custom formulations to manage budget and timing.
case_studies.results:
• 9 initial SKUs launched
• Blended strategy of custom and stock formulas kept development on budget

case_studies.title: Fast-Track Clay Mask Launch for Spa Brand
case_studies.summary: A spa brand leveraged a ready-made clay mask base to launch quickly under its own label.
case_studies.content: Using our pre-stabilized clay mask base, we developed three aromatherapeutic variants for in-spa and retail sale, compressing development timelines.
case_studies.results:
• 3-month time-to-launch
• Immediate adoption across the brand’s flagship spa locations
